task_completion.description: Open and read the engineering specification document to get the required parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/fsw_spec.txt.

task_completion.description: Open the baseline eCRM-001 model in the OpenVSP GUI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP GUI is open and displays the baseline aircraft model. The geometry browser or window title should indicate eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3 is loaded.

task_completion.description: Change the Wing sweep and Wing X-Location in the OpenVSP GUI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP geometry editor window for the Wing is open, showing modified values for sweep (likely negative for forward sweep) and X-Location. The 3D view should visually reflect the forward-swept wings.

task_completion.description: Change the Wing tip twist in the OpenVSP GUI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP geometry editor window for the Wing shows modified values for the twist parameter at the tip section.

task_completion.description: Change the Horizontal Tail sweep in the OpenVSP GUI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP geometry editor window for the Horizontal Tail is open, showing modified values for the sweep parameter.

task_completion.description: Save the modified model as eCRM001_fsw.vsp3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 'Save As' dialog showing the new filename eCRM001_fsw.vsp3 in the /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/ directory, or the main OpenVSP window title updated to the new filename.

integrity.description: The agent must use the OpenVSP GUI to make the geometric changes, as explicitly requested in the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the OpenVSP geometry editor dialogs being interacted with to change parameters. The agent should not be seen editing the .vsp3 XML file directly in a text editor or using a python script.

integrity.description: The agent must actually open and read the spec file to obtain the target parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the contents of fsw_spec.txt open on the screen, proving the agent didn't just hallucinate or use pre-programmed values.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file from within OpenVSP rather than just copying/renaming the old file in the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 'File -> Save As' menu or dialog is visible, or the OpenVSP window title updates to the new filename after saving.
